name: Tabs
description: Tabbed navigation for switching between related content panels within the same page context.

list.description: Container for tab buttons. Hosts keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Home/End).

tab.description: Single tab button. Auto-registers with the parent Tabs context.

panel.description: Content panel associated with a tab.

members.name: value
members.description: Controlled value of the active tab.

members.name: onValueChange
members.description: Called when the active tab changes.

members.name: orientation
members.description: Layout direction of the tab list.

members.name: appearance
members.description: Visual style of the tab list. 'underline' draws an indicator bar under the active tab; 'pills' renders each tab as a rounded segmented control.

members.name: activationMode
members.description: Whether tabs activate on focus or require Enter/Space.

members.name: unmountInactive
members.description: Whether inactive panels are unmounted from the DOM.

members.name: idBase
members.description: Base string for generating tab and panel IDs.

activeTab.description: The value of the currently active tab.

activeTabChange.description: Fires when the active tab index changes. Under automatic activation this also fires when focus moves via arrow keys.
triggeredBy: ArrowLeft/ArrowRight (horizontal) or ArrowUp/ArrowDown (vertical) while a tab is focused
Home/End while a tab is focused

payload.name: activeTab
payload.description: Zero-based index of the now-active tab.

stateMachine.description: Automatic activation: arrow navigation moves both focus and the `selection` dimension. Wrapping is enabled at the ends.

transitions.effect: emit activeTabChange(index); move focus to clicked tab
emit activeTabChange(nextIndex); move roving tabindex and DOM focus to next tab (wraps at end)
emit activeTabChange(prevIndex); move roving tabindex and DOM focus to previous tab (wraps at start)
emit activeTabChange(0); move focus to first tab
emit activeTabChange(tabCount-1); move focus to last tab

motion.reducedMotionStrategy: Active indicator moves instantly without animation when prefers-reduced-motion is set.

focus.description: Arrow keys move focus between tabs; focus follows the active indicator. Tab panels are reached with Tab key.

relationships.description: Each tab controls its associated tab panel.
Each tab panel is labelled by its corresponding tab.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the previous tab (horizontal orientation).
Move focus to the next tab (horizontal orientation).
Move focus to the previous tab (vertical orientation).
Move focus to the next tab (vertical orientation).
Move focus to the first tab.
Move focus to the last tab.
Activate the focused tab (when activationMode is manual).
Activate the focused tab (when activationMode is manual).
Move focus to the active tab panel content.

usageHints: Bind value and onValueChange for controlled tabs; use defaultValue for uncontrolled
Use activationMode="manual" when tab panels are expensive to render (focus without selecting)
Each Tab must have a corresponding TabsContent with a matching value string
Use orientation="vertical" for sidebar-style tab lists
